case_title: DIVERSIFIED COLLECTION SERVICES, INC. VS. JOSEPH C. RAVARRA

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT RAVARRA, JOSEPH C.
